lines.text: Excuse me for the interruption. Greetings, esteemed guest.
lines.quest_name: What Yesterday Wept, Today Doth Sing

lines.text: The Primus wishes to invite you for a conversation at the Cathedral of Mercury. Would you be so inclined?
lines.quest_name: What Yesterday Wept, Today Doth Sing

lines.text: I'm merely conveying the Primus' invitation. The choice is yours.
lines.quest_name: What Yesterday Wept, Today Doth Sing

lines.text: Very well, please follow me to the Cathedral of Mercury.
lines.quest_name: What Yesterday Wept, Today Doth Sing
